flowRoot.flowPara: (Turn of the guy, turn of the girl)
* Please note, I'm only using a handful of movements for illustration purposes.

To truly reach embodiment, it means to be full-body, you would have FELT experience of that thing/state/experience. It means that you don’t just know something as thoughts or mental understanding, but also feel it as it occurs within the sensations of your body.

Now just because you’ve reached this stage 5 for learning some movements doesn’t mean the learning ends here. You’ll go back again to stage 1 and repeat the cycle! Yay to learning, it never ends unless you choose to!
